data.title: Diginex (NASDAQ: DGNX) updates acquisition progress, emphasizing growth, with focus on ESG and compliance sectors.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in London, Diginex Limited, listed on NASDAQ as DGNX, shared a strategic update about its acquisition roadmap. The Company emphasized its dedication to boosting growth, broadening market penetration, and enhancing its competitive stance in the swiftly changing ESG and compliance sectors.

data.title: Biomerica's inFoods® IBS Test receives $300 Medicare payment under CLFS, effective Jan 1, 2026.
data.description: Biomerica, Inc., based in Irvine, California, revealed on December 23, 2025, that the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) has set the national Medicare payment rate at $300 for its inFoods® IBS test under the Clinical Laboratory Fee Schedule (CLFS). This rate will be applicable to claims for the InFoods IBS test approved and paid for by Medicare with service dates starting from January 1, 2026. Biomerica, Inc. is a leading provider of cutting-edge diagnostic solutions globally and is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol BMRA.

data.title: Wall Street utilizing Ethereum for tokenized assets, quick settlement, and onchain infrastructure, without direct mention.
data.description: More and more, Ethereum is being utilized for tokenizing money, expediting settlement processes, and establishing regulated on-chain infrastructure. Despite its growing prevalence in these areas, institutions are refraining from explicitly referencing Ethereum.

data.title: Neurocrine Biosciences shared data from Phase 3 study of valbenazine for DCP; CP affects 3 per 1,000 children in US.
data.description: Biopharmaceutical company Neurocrine Biosciences Inc. (NASDAQ: NBIX) released data from its Phase 3 KINECT-DCP study investigating valbenazine's effectiveness, safety, and tolerability in individuals with dyskinetic cerebral palsy (DCP). Cerebral palsy (CP) is a nonprogressive condition affecting movement and posture, with an incidence rate of about three per 1,000 children in the U.S. Dyskinetic cerebral palsy (DCP) manifests in individuals with mixed hyperkinetic movements, such as dystonia and choreoathetosis, resulting in significant motor limitations. Neurocrine's Depression Drug did not meet Phase 2 goals but exhibited a promising safety profile. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: VivoPower shifts focus to Power-To-X, including Sovereign AI Compute Infrastructure; reviewing 682MW solar portfolio. Expansion in key markets.
data.description: VivoPower is planning to concentrate its efforts on pivotal markets with a shortfall of AI computing resources and where the company has strong connections. These markets include Southeast Asia, Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and specific European Union regions.

data.title: AMLM buys high-grade gold projects in Canada & Tanzania; expands global presence.
data.description: In Carson City, Nevada on December 23, 2025, American Lithium Minerals Inc. (OTCID: AMLM), a company specializing in precious metals exploration and development, revealed its plan to acquire two promising gold projects through letters of intent. The projects in consideration are noted for their high potential.

data.title: Global data center construction projects valued at $157.8 billion; North America leads with $800+ billion pipeline.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report titled "Project Insight - Global Data Center Construction Projects (Q3 2025)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. This report offers an in-depth examination of data center construction projects on a worldwide scale, focusing on projects monitored by the analyst. Currently, the analyst is observing a global pipeline consisting of substantial data center projects amounting to a cumulative value of $157.8 billion. This pipeline comprises projects valued at over $25 million, starting from the pre-planning stages.

data.title: Fortytwo Telecom launches Telegram-based P2P platform, enhancing enterprise messaging with AI, certification, and SMS failover. Spectral Capital Corporation (OTCQB:FCCN) leads the advancement.
data.description: Fortytwo is enhancing its worldwide presence by introducing a new platform that offers secure and certified Telegram communications, advanced onboarding processes, AI-powered customer engagement, and SMS failover. This development comes as Spectral Capital Corporation (OTCQB:FCCN), also known as Spectral, disclosed that the new platform will serve as a significant expansion to its existing services. The Company is headquartered in SANTA VENERA, Malta, and made this announcement on Dec. 23, 2025. The new platform is expected to bolster Fortytwo's global connectivity and customer service capabilities, making it easier for users to engage with the Company through various communication channels.

data.title: ADP's NER Pulse: U.S. private employers added average of 11,500 jobs per week ending Dec. 6, 2025. Job growth slowed.
data.description: In Roseland, New Jersey, on December 23, 2025, it was reported that in the four weeks leading up to December 6, 2025, private employers in the United States collectively added an average of 11,500 jobs per week. This data was obtained from the NER Pulse, a weekly publication that provides insights derived from the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER). Despite a decrease in the pace of job creation compared to previous periods, this figure highlights ongoing employment growth trends in the country.

data.title: U.S. home prices rose by 0.2% in November from the previous month, with a 2.6% increase from a year earlier according to Redfin.
data.description: In Seattle, U.S. home prices saw a 0.2% month-over-month increase in November on a seasonally adjusted basis, slightly down from October's 0.3% rise. Data from a recent report by Redfin, the real estate brokerage backed by Rocket, showed a 2.6% year-over-year increase, a bit slower than the previous month's 2.9% growth. Home-price growth has been decelerating throughout the year, with November recording the smallest year-over-year increase so far.

data.title: RxWellness COO Phoebe Casey named to WPO Women2Watch 2025 list for leading fast-growing healthcare company. #HERNDON, Va, Dec. 23.
data.description: One of the nation's fastest-growing women-led healthcare companies, RxWellness Spine & Health, based in Herndon, Virginia, highlighted its Co-Founder and Chief Operating Officer, Phoebe Casey, who was recognized for her contributions. The announcement was made on December 23, 2025. Casey's achievement was acknowledged through her appointment to the Women's Presidents organization. This recognition underscores RxWellness' impressive growth trajectory and commitment to fostering female leadership in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Bybit launches Mantle Vault in partnership with Mantle and Cian, for stablecoin returns, the second-largest exchange.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, collaborates with Mantle and Cian to introduce Mantle Vault on Bybit On-Chain Earn. This product is a stablecoin on-chain yield asset management offering, designed to provide users with increased opportunities for passive income generation in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Ark Invest's Cathie Wood sells more Tesla stock as Q4 deliveries near, shifting to crypto. Market unbothered despite stock highs for self-driving bets.
data.description: Ark Invest, led by Cathie Wood, is reallocating funds towards cryptocurrency investments while Tesla stock continues to soar on market expectations of self-driving technology advancements, despite overlooking delivery statistics. Wood has recently divested more Tesla shares, with fourth-quarter delivery figures awaiting announcement, although market sentiment appears largely indifferent to this key data.
